translation.为稳定而生的智能网关: A smart gateway built for stability
translation.为空则默认使用服务器地址，多个 Origin 用逗号分隔，例如 https://: If empty, defaults to server address. Multiple Origins separated by commas, e.g.: https://newapi.pro,https://newapi.com. Note: cannot contain [], must use https
translation.为联网、代码执行等工具调用配置独立计费策略。: 为联网、代码执行等工具调用配置独立计费策略。
translation.为长时间编码、团队共享和自动化脚本准备的高可用 AI API 网关。: A high-availability AI API gateway for long coding sessions, team sharing, and automation scripts.
translation.为高频 AI 编程场景打造的统一 API 入口。自动调度多家上游渠道，降低单渠道: A unified API entry point for high-frequency AI coding. It automatically schedules multiple upstream channels to reduce rate limits, volatility, and cost pressure from any single channel, keeping Codex, Claude Code, OpenAI SDK, and common clients running smoothly.
translation.产品侧先保持当前价格展示，等待真实分组倍率样本。: Keep current product pricing visible and wait for real group ratio samples.
translation.产品确认权限边界，运营确认后台角色职责，前端逐步接入配置化能力。: Product confirms permission boundaries, operations confirms admin role duties, and frontend gradually connects configurable capabilities.
translation.产品配置错误，请联系管理员: Product configuration error, please contact the administrator
translation.人工补单前先核对支付平台流水。: Verify payment platform transaction records before manual completion.
translation.仅为使用OpenAI格式的Gemini/Vertex渠道填充thoughtSig: Fill thoughtSignature only for Gemini/Vertex channels using the OpenAI format
translation.仅主节点执行探活: Only the master node runs probes
translation.仅会覆盖你勾选的字段，未勾选的字段保持本地不变。: Only selected fields will be overwritten, unselected fields remain unchanged.
translation.仅供参考，以实际扣费为准: For reference only, actual deduction shall prevail
translation.仅保存快照，不会自动改写线上倍率。: Only saves a snapshot and will not rewrite live ratios automatically.
translation.仅修改展示粒度，统计精确到小时: Only modify display granularity, statistics accurate to the hour
translation.仅在成本优先策略下，明显更低成本且速度评分影响可接受的候选才会打破粘滞。: Only in cost-first mode, a clearly cheaper candidate with acceptable speed score impact can break sticky routing.
translation.仅当前请求换候选，不降权: Switch candidates only for the current request, with no downgrade
translation.仅当自动禁用开启时有效，关闭后不会自动禁用该渠道: Only effective when automatic disabling is enabled, after closing, the channel will not be automatically disabled
translation.仅影响调度避让，不计入渠道健康评分: Only affects routing avoidance, not channel health score
translation.仅提醒不拦截绑定；二次确认会在同品牌不同账号共用同一代理时要求确认；禁止复用会直: Warn only does not block binding; require confirmation asks for confirmation when different accounts of the same brand share one proxy; block reuse prevents the binding directly.
translation.仅支持 Codex OAuth JSON 对象，必须包含 access_toke: Only Codex OAuth JSON objects are supported and must include access_token and account_id. Use the OpenAI channel for standard OpenAI API keys and Codex models
translation.仅支持 JSON 对象，必须包含 access_token 与 account_: Only JSON objects are supported, must include access_token and account_id
translation.仅支持 JSON 文件，支持多文件: Only JSON files are supported, multiple files are supported
translation.仅支持 OpenAI 接口格式: Only OpenAI interface format is supported
translation.仅清理该 key_id 对应的粘滞路由缓存: Only the sticky routing cache for this key_id will be cleared
translation.仅用于开发环境，生产环境应使用 HTTPS: For development only, use HTTPS in production
translation.仅用于换算，实际保存的是额度: For conversion only, quota is what gets saved
translation.仅补齐缺失的稳定 Header；不会复用历史 Session、Window 或: Only fills missing stable headers; historical Session, Window, or Turn Metadata is never reused
translation.仅重算最近6小时的统计归因: Only recalculates attribution for the last 6 hours
translation.从个人开发到团队协作，把成本、稳定性和分组治理拆成更容易理解的选择。: From personal development to team collaboration, turn cost, stability, and group governance into clear choices.
translation.从令牌可用模型中选择 Claude 可用模型，建议区分主模型、Haiku、Son: Choose an available Claude model from the token model list. Configure main, Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus models separately when needed.
translation.从令牌可用模型中选择 Codex 可用模型，模型名必须和本站显示一致。: Choose an available Codex model from the token model list. The model name must match this site exactly.
translation.从令牌可用模型中选择 Gemini 可用模型，模型名以本站显示为准。: Choose an available Gemini model from the token model list. Use the model name shown on this site.
translation.从当前账号可见模型加载: Loaded from models visible to the current account
translation.从接入、计费、监控到故障处理都在一个控制台完成，适合长期稳定运营和团队协作。: Access, billing, monitoring, and incident handling are all managed in one console, suitable for long-term operations and team collaboration.
translation.从认证器应用中获取验证码，或使用备用码: Get verification code from authenticator app, or use backup code
translation.从默认列表中去掉一个分组: Remove a group from the default list
translation.代理会作为独立资源记录使用品牌和账号，后续可用于避免同品牌重复使用同一出口: The proxy is recorded as an independent resource with brand and account usage, so later rules can avoid reusing the same exit for the same brand
translation.令牌、分组或模型权限不足，检查令牌限制和账户状态。: Token, group, or model permissions are insufficient. Check token limits and account status.
translation.令牌分组，留空时按 auto 自动链路处理: Token group, when left empty it follows the auto chain
translation.令牌分组，默认为用户的分组: Token group, default is your group
translation.令牌分组设为 auto 时，按以下顺序依次尝试选择可用分组，排在前面的优先级更高: When token group is set to auto, groups are selected in order of priority, with higher priority groups listed first
translation.令牌分组设为 auto 时，系统按优先级顺序自动选择一个可用分组。: When token group is set to auto, the system automatically selects an available group by priority.
translation.令牌创建成功，请在列表页面点击复制获取令牌！: Token created successfully, please click copy on the list page to get the token!
translation.令牌可能没有可用模型，检查令牌限制或手动填写模型名。: The token may have no available models. Check token limits or enter the model name manually.
translation.令牌已重置并已复制到剪贴板: Token has been reset and copied to clipboard
translation.令牌未禁用，且账户余额充足。: The token is enabled and the account has enough balance.
translation.令牌的额度仅用于限制令牌本身的最大额度使用量，实际的使用受到账户的剩余额度限制: The quota of the token is only used to limit the maximum quota usage of the token itself, and the actual usage is limited by the remaining quota of the account
translation.以下上游数据可能不可信：: The following upstream data may not be reliable:
translation.以下文件解析失败，已忽略：{{list}}: The following files failed to parse and have been ignored: {{list}}
translation.价格暂时不可用，请稍后重试: Price temporarily unavailable, please try again later
translation.价格来自配置价格设置，倍率来自渠道设置；后台异步补算，不影响用户请求。: Prices come from pricing settings, while multipliers come from channel settings. Costs are calculated asynchronously and do not affect user requests.
translation.价格根据模型、分组倍率、缓存和图片用量实时计算: Prices are calculated in real time by model, group ratio, cache, and image usage
translation.价格根据用量档位和请求条件动态调整: Price adjusts dynamically based on usage tiers and request conditions
translation.价格随真实请求样本自动校准: Pricing auto-calibrates from real request samples
translation.企业账户为特殊返回格式，需要特殊处理，如果非企业账户，请勿勾选: Enterprise accounts have special return format and require special handling. If not an enterprise account, do not check this option
translation.优先使用令牌页的 CC Switch 导入；手动配置时 Base URL 填站点: Prefer CC Switch import on the token page. For manual setup, set Base URL to the site root address.
translation.优先使用令牌页的 CC Switch 导入；手动配置时按配置表填写。: Prefer CC Switch import on the token page. For manual setup, follow the configuration table.
translation.优先处理影响请求成功率、扣费准确性和渠道连续可用性的事项。: Prioritize items that affect request success rate, billing accuracy, and continuous channel availability.
translation.优先展示有队列、并发、熔断或低成功率的运行键。: 优先展示有队列、并发、熔断或低成功率的运行键。
translation.优先查看失败错误、重试链路和上游状态。: Start with the failure error, retry chain, and upstream status.
translation.优先检查高价兜底、图片或按次模型成本，必要时收紧低价入口。: Check premium fallback, image, or per-call model costs first; tighten low-price entry points if needed.
translation.优先消耗订阅套餐额度，避免钱包余额被提前扣减。: Use subscription plan quota first to avoid deducting wallet balance too early.
translation.会创建未保存的新规则，确认后仍需逐条保存。: This creates unsaved new rules; save each one after confirming.
translation.低于此额度时将发送邮件提醒用户: Email reminder will be sent when quota falls below this
translation.低价组优先，成本更可预期: Low-cost groups first, with more predictable spend
translation.低余额、耗尽或余额刷新异常账号。: 低余额、耗尽或余额刷新异常账号。
translation.低成本候选速度样本不足: Low-cost candidate has insufficient speed samples
translation.体验异常率不包含空输出，只统计非空输出的体验问题: Experience issue rate excludes empty outputs and only counts non-empty experience issues
translation.余额、失败率、连续异常和渠道禁用风险。: Balance, failure rate, consecutive anomalies, and channel disablement risks.
translation.余额不足，充值后重试。: Insufficient balance. Top up and try again.
translation.余额告警、账号恢复和倍率同步结果: Balance alerts, account recovery, and ratio sync results
translation.余额按量抵扣，套餐之外也能灵活使用: Pay-as-you-go balance for flexible usage beyond plans
translation.作废后该订阅将立即失效，历史记录不受影响。是否继续？: After invalidation, the subscription becomes invalid immediately. History is not affected. Continue?
translation.你似乎并没有修改什么: You seem to have not modified anything
translation.你可以在“自定义模型名称”处手动添加它们，然后点击填入后再提交，或者直接使用下方: You can manually add them under “Custom model names”, click Fill and submit, or use the actions below to handle them automatically.
translation.你还没有处理{{type}}模型（{{count}}个）。是否仅提交当前已勾选内: You have not processed {{type}} models ({{count}}). Submit only the currently selected items?
translation.使用 JSON 对象格式，格式为：{\"组名\": [最多请求次数, 最多请求完: Use JSON object format, format: {"group_name": [max_requests, max_completions]}
translation.使用 Passkey 实现免密且更安全的登录体验: Use Passkey for password-free and more secure login experience
translation.使用 邮箱或用户名 登录: Sign in with Email or Username
translation.使用本站 API Key 和 Base URL 接入 Codex，统一走中转、计: Connect Codex with this site API key and Base URL, with unified relay, billing, and usage logs.
translation.使用认证器应用（如 Google Authenticator、Microsoft: Use an authenticator app (such as Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator) to scan the QR code below:
translation.使用认证器应用扫描二维码: Scan QR code with authenticator app
translation.例如：Codex 账号池 5 月采购: Example: Codex account pool May purchase
translation.例如：default 分组倍率灰度观察: For example: default group multiplier canary observation
translation.例如：先对 default 分组小流量灰度 2 小时: Example: canary the default group with low traffic for 2 hours
translation.例如：该请求不满足准入策略: e.g.: This request does not meet the admission policy
translation.例如：需要等级 {{required}}，你当前等级 {{current}}: e.g.: Required level {{required}}, your current level is {{current}}
translation.例如发卡网站的购买链接: E.g., purchase link from card issuing website
translation.侧栏模块配置后续拆成普通端和管理端两套。: Sidebar module settings will be split into separate user and admin configurations.
translation.保存/重置模型倍率、分组倍率、上游价格同步和工具价格: Save/reset model ratios, group ratios, upstream price sync, and tool prices
translation.保存上游成本配置失败: Failed to save upstream cost configuration
translation.保存健康探活设置失败: Failed to save health probe settings
translation.保存后会将同一个代理应用到这些账号: Saving will apply the same proxy to these accounts
translation.保存支付、OAuth、SMTP、限流、性能设置: Save payment, OAuth, SMTP, rate-limit, and performance settings
translation.保存模型倍率、分组倍率、工具价格: Save model ratios, group ratios, and tool prices
translation.保存渠道分值加成失败: Failed to save channel score boosts
translation.保留最近生成的建议，方便人工复盘和后续接入 AI。: Keep recent recommendations for manual review and future AI integration.
translation.保留原值（目标已有值时不覆盖）: Keep original value (do not overwrite if target already has a value)
translation.保留原有运行态、队列、粘滞、风险与 Replay 明细，用于技术排障: Keep the existing runtime, queue, sticky, risk, and Replay details for technical troubleshooting.
translation.倍率建议已生成但尚未确认，收入缺口可能继续累积。: A ratio recommendation exists but is not confirmed, so the revenue gap may keep accumulating.
translation.倍率是为了方便换算不同价格的模型: The magnification is to facilitate the conversion of models with different prices.
translation.倍率用于计费乘数，勾选「用户可选」后用户可在创建令牌时选择该分组: Ratio is the billing multiplier. Check "User Selectable" to let users pick this group when creating tokens
translation.假设再加两个分组 default 和 vip，但不勾选用户可选：: Now add two more groups default and vip, but without checking User Selectable:
translation.健康评分不随瞬时并发下降，并发只作为压力参考: Health score does not drop with transient concurrency; concurrency is only a pressure reference
translation.健康评分不随瞬时并发下降，并发只影响调度避让: Health score does not drop with transient concurrency; concurrency only affects routing avoidance
translation.允许 HTTP 协议图片请求（适用于自部署代理）: Allow HTTP protocol image requests (for self-deployed proxies)
translation.允许回调（会泄露服务器 IP 地址）: Allow callback (will leak server IP address)
translation.允许在 Stripe 支付中输入促销码: Allow entering promotion codes during Stripe checkout
translation.允许的IP，一行一个，不填写则不限制: Allowed IPs, one per line, not filled in means no restrictions
translation.允许访问私有IP地址（127.0.0.1、192.168.x.x等内网地址）: Allow access to private IP addresses (127.0.0.1, 192.168.x.x and other internal addresses)
translation.允许通过 Discord 账户登录 & 注册: Allow login & registration via Discord account
translation.允许通过 GitHub 账户登录 & 注册: Allow login & registration via GitHub account
translation.允许通过 Linux DO 账户登录 & 注册: Allow login & registration via Linux DO account
translation.充值、告警和停用均按账号维度处理: Top-up, alerts, and pauses are handled per account
translation.充值余额会按模型价格、分组倍率和动态计费规则实时扣减，适合临时扩容、补足套餐额度: Recharge balance is deducted in real time by model price, group ratio, and dynamic billing rules. Use it for bursts, topping up plan quota, or on-demand calls.
translation.充值倍率独立用于金额换算，不属于成本倍率: Recharge multiplier is separate for amount conversion and is not a cost multiplier
translation.充值分组倍率不是合法的 JSON 字符串: Top Up group ratio is not a valid JSON string
translation.充值成本和到账额度必须大于 0: Recharge cost and received balance must be greater than 0
translation.充值数量不能小于: The top up amount cannot be less than
translation.充值方式设置不是合法的 JSON 字符串: Top Up method settings is not a valid JSON string
translation.充值金额折扣配置不是合法的 JSON 对象: Top Up amount discount configuration is not a valid JSON object
translation.先填写配置，再自动填充 OAuth 端点，能显著减少手工输入: Fill in configuration first, then auto-fill OAuth endpoints to significantly reduce manual input
translation.先处理回退原因，避免长期按静态倍率运行导致利润偏差。: Resolve the fallback reason first to avoid long static-ratio runs and profit drift.
translation.先按场景选择成本、稳定或治理优先级，再进入控制台配置适合自己的套餐。: Choose whether cost, stability, or governance matters most for your scenario, then configure the right plan in the console.
translation.先排查失败日志、渠道状态和主资源满载情况，失败不进入财务收入但会影响交付。: Check failure logs, channel status, and primary-resource saturation first. Failed requests do not enter revenue but still hurt delivery.
translation.先排查异常上游成本、失败请求和资源损耗，再调整倍率。: Check abnormal upstream cost, failed requests, and resource loss before changing ratios.
translation.先搜索，再一键复制字段名或填入当前规则。字段名为系统内部路径，可直接用于路径 /: Search first, then copy field names or fill into the current rule with one click. Field names are internal system paths that can be used directly for path / source / target.
translation.先积累真实成功请求，再判断倍率和资源成本。: Accumulate successful real requests before judging ratios and resource costs.
translation.先等主资源，超时再兜底: Wait for primary resources first, then fall back after timeout
translation.先观察真实请求量，再判断完成率和调度质量。: Observe real request volume before judging completion rate and scheduling quality.
translation.免责声明：仅限个人使用，请勿分发或共享任何凭证。该渠道存在前置条件与使用门槛，请: Disclaimer: Personal use only. Do not distribute or share any credentials. This channel has prerequisites and requires prior setup; use only if you understand the flow and risks, and comply with OpenAI’s terms and policies. Credentials and configuration are for Codex CLI integration only, and are not intended for any other client, platform, or channel.
translation.兑换码创建成功，是否下载兑换码？: Redemption code created successfully. Do you want to download it?
translation.兑换码将以文本文件的形式下载，文件名为兑换码的名称。: The redemption code will be downloaded as a text file, with the filename being the redemption code name.
translation.兜底渠道可选，留空使用非主资源候选: Optional fallback channels; leave empty to use non-primary candidates
translation.全局控制侧边栏区域和功能显示，管理员隐藏的功能用户无法启用: Global control of sidebar areas and functions, users cannot enable functions hidden by administrators
translation.全局支付、模型、倍率、限流和性能配置由超级管理员维护。: Global payment, model, ratio, rate-limit, and performance settings are maintained by super admins.
translation.全局设置页签只在 role >= 100 时渲染，普通管理员只能查看边界说明。: Global settings tabs render only for role >= 100; regular admins only see boundary guidance.
translation.全渠道账号与归档池: All channel accounts and archive pools
translation.全部地区总可用资源: Total Available Resources in All Regions
translation.公开展示当前动态计费倍率走势，帮助你在调用前快速了解今天、昨天和近 7 天的价格: Publicly shows the current dynamic billing multiplier trend, helping you quickly understand price movement for today, yesterday, and the last 7 days before calling.
translation.公开首页只展示脱敏后的全站汇总：成功率、延迟、请求量和保护事件，不暴露渠道、模型: The public homepage only shows anonymized site-wide totals: success rate, latency, request volume, and protection events, without exposing channels, models, or error reasons.
translation.公式：按次成本 ÷ 充值倍率 = 上游成本估算: Formula: per-request cost ÷ recharge multiplier = estimated upstream cost
translation.公式：系统固定价格 × 按次成本倍率 ÷ 充值倍率 = 上游成本估算: Formula: system fixed price × per-request cost multiplier ÷ recharge multiplier = estimated upstream cost
translation.公式：系统模型定价 × 对应成本倍率 ÷ 充值倍率 = 上游成本估算: Formula: system model price × matching cost multiplier ÷ recharge multiplier = estimated upstream cost
translation.公式：系统模型定价 × 成本倍率 ÷ 充值倍率 = 上游成本估算: Formula: system model price × cost multiplier ÷ recharge multiplier = estimated upstream cost
translation.关注转化、续费和投诉反馈，避免倍率变化过快影响产品体验。: Watch conversion, renewals, and complaints so ratio changes do not move faster than product tolerance.
translation.关闭后，此模型将不会被“同步官方”自动覆盖或创建: After closing, this model will not be automatically overwritten or created by "Sync Official"
translation.关闭后将不再显示此提示（仅对当前浏览器生效）。确定要关闭吗？: After closing, this notice will no longer be shown (only for this browser). Are you sure you want to close it?
translation.兼容 Responses、Chat Completions 与 Claude M: Compatible with Responses, Chat Completions, and Claude Messages for CLIs, IDEs, and automation scripts.
translation.内存使用率超过此值时拒绝请求: Reject requests when memory usage exceeds this value
translation.内存缓存最大条目数。0 表示使用后端默认容量：100000。: Maximum entries for in-memory cache. 0 uses the backend default capacity: 100000.
translation.内容较大，已启用性能优化模式: Content is large, performance optimization mode enabled
translation.内容较大，部分功能可能受限: Content is large, some features may be limited
translation.最低充值美元数量必须大于 0: Minimum recharge dollar amount must be greater than 0
translation.最终失败类型：client_request_error: Final failure type: client request error
translation.最高分并列，按候选顺序保留先出现候选: Top score tied; kept the first candidate by candidate order
translation.冷启动渠道只做渐进探测，不代表渠道健康异常: Cold-start channels are probed gradually; this does not mean the channel is unhealthy
translation.分享专属邀请链接，好友注册并消费后奖励自动计入邀请余额: Share your invite link. Rewards are added after friends register and use the service
translation.分享链接或二维码，好友注册后会自动绑定邀请关系: Share the link or QR code. Friends are bound automatically after registration
translation.分摊成本用于定位哪些分组、渠道或模型正在吞噬利润。: Allocated cost helps locate which groups, channels, or models are consuming profit.
translation.分组倍率实时生效: Group ratios apply in real time
translation.分组倍率设置，可以在此处新增分组或修改现有分组的倍率，格式为 JSON 字符串，: Group ratio settings, you can add new groups or modify existing group ratios here, format as JSON string, e.g.: {"vip": 0.5, "test": 1}, indicating vip group ratio is 0.5, test group ratio is 1
translation.分组动态倍率行生成的快照会保存在这里，方便人工复盘和灰度。: Snapshots generated from group dynamic ratio rows are saved here for manual review and canary rollout.
translation.分组名称到倍率的映射: Mapping of group names to ratios
translation.分组快照只保存当前矩阵数据，不会自动调整线上倍率。: Group snapshots only save the current matrix data and do not automatically adjust live ratios.
translation.分组是用于控制计费倍率和模型访问权限的核心概念。每个用户属于一个分组，每个令牌也: Groups are a core concept for controlling billing ratios and model access. Each user belongs to a group, and each token can be assigned to a specific group.
translation.分组权重越高，这项越高: Higher group weight raises this item
translation.分组策略选择动态收费倍率后，请求会按实际选中的分组读取后台动态倍率；未命中时自动: When a group policy uses the dynamic billing ratio, requests read the backend dynamic ratio for the actual selected group; misses fall back to the static group ratio.
translation.分组策略选择动态收费倍率后，请求会按实际选中的分组读取后台动态倍率；目标毛利率按: After the group strategy selects dynamic billing multiplier, requests read the backend dynamic multiplier for the actually selected group; target gross margin uses "Revenue = Cost / (1 - Target gross margin)", so 35% gross margin equals a 1.538x revenue multiplier and 100% cost profit equals a 50% gross margin.
translation.分组速率配置优先级高于全局速率限制。: Group rate configuration priority is higher than global rate limit.
translation.切换扣费偏好后，新请求会按新的顺序进行扣费。: After switching billing preference, new requests follow the updated order.
translation.划转后将进入账户余额，可用于充值抵扣和 API 消费: Transferred rewards enter account balance for top-up deductions and API usage
translation.列出的模型将不会自动添加或移除-thinking/-nothinking 后缀: Models in this list will not automatically add or remove the -thinking/-nothinking suffix.
translation.列表已适配宽表扫描，可展开行查看完整计费过程。: The wide table is optimized for scanning; expand a row to inspect the full billing process.
translation.创建、更新、禁用角色和分配用户权限: Create, update, disable roles, and assign user permissions
translation.创建令牌后，将 Base URL 设置为本站地址，剩下的模型、渠道、价格和故障切: After creating a token, set the Base URL to this site. The gateway handles models, channels, pricing, and failover.
translation.创建令牌后，将 Base URL 设置为本站地址，模型和渠道调度由网关统一处理。: After creating a token, set the Base URL to this site. Model and channel routing are handled by the gateway.
translation.创建令牌默认选择auto分组，初始令牌也将设为auto（否则留空，为用户默认分组: Create token with auto group by default, initial token will also be set to auto (otherwise leave blank for user default group)
translation.创建或选择密钥时，将 Project 设置为 io.cloud: When creating or selecting a key, set Project to io.cloud
translation.创建渠道后即可维护该渠道的成本倍率和充值倍率: After creating the channel, you can maintain its cost and recharge multipliers
translation.创建渠道所需的基本信息: Basic information needed to create a channel
translation.创建渠道时会随渠道一起保存成本倍率和充值换算: Cost ratio and recharge conversion will be saved with the channel
translation.创建渠道时会随渠道一起保存费用计算和充值换算: Fee calculation and recharge conversion will be saved with the channel when it is created
translation.删除上游成本配置失败: Failed to delete upstream cost configuration
translation.删除会彻底移除该订阅记录（含权益明细）。是否继续？: Deletion will permanently remove this subscription record (including benefit details). Continue?
translation.删除后无法恢复，确定要删除模型 \"{{name}}\" 吗？: Cannot be recovered after deletion, are you sure you want to delete model "{{name}}"?
translation.删除后该凭证将从渠道中移除，此操作不可撤销: After deletion, this credential will be removed from the channel. This cannot be undone.
translation.删除后该资源不再参与后续经营成本统计，确定继续吗？: After deletion this resource will no longer be included in operating cost statistics. Continue?
translation.删除后这些凭证将从渠道中移除，此操作不可撤销: After deletion, these credentials will be removed from the channel. This cannot be undone.
translation.删除渠道、批量删除、成本重算: Delete channels, bulk delete, cost recalculation
translation.剪贴板中未检测到连接信息: No connection info found in clipboard
translation.加权贡献变化，才会影响稳定评分总分: Weighted contribution change; this is what affects the stable score total
translation.加载上游成本配置失败: Failed to load upstream cost configuration
translation.加载健康探活设置失败: Failed to load health probe settings
translation.加载健康检测数据失败: Failed to load health check data
translation.加载智能调度配置失败: Failed to load smart scheduling config
translation.加载渠道分值加成失败: Failed to load channel score boosts
Failed to load user agreement content...
translation.加载评分变更记录失败: Failed to load score change records
Failed to load privacy policy content...
translation.动态倍率建议已关闭，仅保留快照。: Dynamic ratio suggestions are disabled; only the snapshot is kept.
translation.勾选后，该分组会出现在用户创建令牌时的下拉菜单中。未勾选的分组只能由管理员分配，: When checked, this group appears in the dropdown when users create tokens. Unchecked groups can only be assigned by admin.
translation.包含来自未知或未标明供应商的AI模型，这些模型可能来自小型供应商或开源项目。: Includes AI models from unknown or unmarked suppliers, which may come from small suppliers or open-source projects.
translation.包括失败请求的次数，0代表不限制: Including failed request times, 0 means no limit
translation.历史字段：原始子项变化，不等于总分直接加减: Legacy field: raw item change, not a direct add/subtract on the total score
translation.历史样本越多，动态评分越可信: More historical samples make the dynamic score more reliable
translation.原价，和普通用户一样: original price, same as regular users
translation.原始子项变化，不等于总分直接加减: Raw item change; not a direct add/subtract on the total score
translation.原粘滞候选未满足保留条件，改选当前更优候选: Previous sticky candidate did not meet retention conditions; switched to the current better candidate
translation.原粘滞候选未被保留，原因是 {{reason}}。: The previous sticky candidate was not kept because {{reason}}.
translation.去重完成：去重前 {{before}} 个密钥，去重后 {{after}} 个密: Deduplication completed: {{before}} keys before deduplication, {{after}} keys after deduplication
translation.参数覆盖必须是合法的 JSON 对象: Parameter override must be a valid JSON object
translation.参数覆盖必须是合法的 JSON 格式！: Parameter override must be in valid JSON format!
translation.参数覆盖模板 JSON 格式不正确: Parameter override template JSON format is incorrect
translation.参考建议收入倍率进行小流量灰度，不要一次性全量调整。: Use the suggested revenue multiplier for a small canary first; avoid a full rollout.
translation.参考成本来自渠道上游成本配置，用于换算成本分，不代表本次实际消费: Reference cost comes from the channel upstream cost profile and is used to calculate the cost score; it is not this request's actual spend
translation.发送一句简单对话，确认客户端返回正常并在本站生成用量日志。: Send a simple chat message, confirm the client responds, and check usage logs on this site.
translation.只体检平常表现不错的渠道: Only probe channels that usually perform well
translation.只对 Role 100 开放；保存前请确认影响范围、回滚方式和运营窗口。: Only available to Role 100; confirm impact scope, rollback path, and operations window before saving.
translation.只支持HTTPS，系统将以POST方式发送通知，请确保地址可以接收POST请求: Only HTTPS is supported, the system will send notifications via POST, please ensure that the address can receive POST requests
translation.只有当用户设置开启IP记录时，才会进行请求和错误类型日志的IP记录: Only when the user sets IP recording, the IP recording of request and error type logs will be performed
translation.只有调度记录，等待 attempt 或结算写入: Only dispatch record exists; waiting for attempt or billing write
translation.只有配置了规则的组合才会覆盖，未配置的组合仍使用令牌分组的基础倍率。: Only configured combinations are overridden. Unconfigured combinations still use the token group's base ratio.
translation.只由可通过探活修复的质量评分项换算: Calculated only from quality score items that probes can recover
translation.只记录运营决策，不会自动调整线上倍率。: Only records the operational decision; live ratios are not changed automatically.
translation.只需替换 Base URL 和 Key，即可继续使用现有 OpenAI 兼容客户: Replace only the Base URL and key to keep using existing OpenAI-compatible clients.
translation.可以根据用户分组增减令牌可选的分组范围。例如 vip 用户额外开放 premiu: Adjust the selectable group range based on user group. E.g., grant vip users access to premium, or remove access to a group.
translation.可以根据用户分组设置不同的计费倍率。例如 vip 用户使用 standard 令: Set different billing ratios based on user group. E.g., vip users using standard tokens get ratio 0.8 instead of 1.0.
translation.可信且无冲突的倍率变化将自动写入配置: Trusted, conflict-free ratio changes will be written automatically
translation.可划转奖励可随时划转到账户余额: Transferable rewards can be moved to account balance anytime
translation.可同时上传文件并粘贴凭证；导入后默认禁用，测试和功能检查仍可使用: You can upload files and paste credentials at the same time. Imported accounts are disabled by default, while testing and capability checks remain available.
translation.可在设置页面设置关于内容，支持 HTML & Markdown: The About content can be set on the settings page, supporting HTML & Markdown
translation.可复制或批量删除所选令牌: Copy or bulk delete selected tokens
translation.可归因上游错误越少，这项越高: Fewer attributable upstream errors raise this score
translation.可手动填写，多个 scope 用空格分隔: Can be filled in manually, separate multiple scopes with spaces
translation.可留空；填写时必须是包含 access_token 和 account_id 的: Optional. If provided, it must be a Codex OAuth JSON credential containing access_token and account_id. If left empty, import accounts from Account Management after creation
translation.可留空；留空时会尝试使用 Issuer URL + /.well-known/o: Can be left empty; when empty, will try using Issuer URL + /.well-known/openid-configuration
translation.可能导致同模型候选渠道减少: May reduce candidate channels for the same model
translation.可选，公告的补充说明: Optional, additional information for the notice
translation.可选，用量达到此档时加收的固定费用: Optional fixed fee charged when usage reaches this tier
translation.可选：基于用户信息 JSON 做组合条件准入，条件不满足时返回自定义提示: Optional: Admission based on combined conditions from user info JSON; returns custom message when conditions are not met
translation.可选：用于自动生成端点或 Discovery URL: Optional: Used to auto-generate endpoints or Discovery URL
translation.可选。匹配入口请求的 User-Agent；任意一行作为子串匹配（忽略大小写）即: Optional. Match the incoming request's User-Agent; any line matched as a substring (case-insensitive) counts as a hit.
translation.可选。对提取到的亲和 Key 做正则校验；不填表示不校验。: Optional. Validate the extracted affinity key with regex; leave empty to skip validation.
translation.可选。对请求路径进行匹配；不填表示匹配所有路径。: Optional. Match the request path; leave empty to match all paths.
translation.同一次请求会拆分输入、输出、缓存读取和图片生成等计费项，命中动态规则时按实际档位: A single request is split into input, output, cache read, image generation, and other billing items; dynamic rules settle by the matched tier.
translation.同品牌不同账号共用同一代理时按该策略处理: Applies when different accounts of the same brand share one proxy
translation.同品牌多账号共用出口提醒: Reminder for same-brand accounts sharing one egress
translation.同步供应商价格变化，减少手工维护成本。: 同步供应商价格变化，减少手工维护成本。
translation.同步渠道失败：缺少部署信息: Failed to sync channel: Missing deployment info
translation.后台 26 个入口统一从权限配置生成，避免菜单和权限文档漂移。: All 26 admin entries are generated from the permission config to prevent menu and permission documentation drift.
translation.后台低频探测低分、缺样本或长时间未成功的渠道，只进入渠道健康评分和管理员消费日志: Runs low-frequency background probes for low-score, undersampled, or long-unsuccessful channels. Results only affect channel health scores and admin consumption logs, not the user request view.
translation.后台异步读取消费日志并补算供应商成本，只写入成本汇总表；用户请求、首包和流式转发: A background worker reads consume logs asynchronously and backfills provider costs into the cost summary table only; user requests, first token, and streaming relay do not wait for cost calculation.
translation.后台渠道页已按运营视角整理为渠道信息、路由状态、健康状态和成本结算四个区域，保留: The admin channel page is organized from an operations perspective into channel information, routing status, health status, and cost settlement, while retaining existing batch operations and testing capabilities.
translation.后台账号与普通用户边界。: Boundary between admin accounts and regular users.
translation.后台默认落点和核心运营指标: Default admin landing page and core operation metrics
translation.后台默认落点已从渠道管理切换为经营总览，后续只需要把聚合数据 API 接进来。: The admin default landing page has moved from channel management to business overview. Next, connect the aggregated data API.
translation.后端固定倍率：{{ratio}}。该字段仅展示换算后的价格。: Backend fixed ratio: {{ratio}}. This field only displays the converted price.
translation.后端权限接口暂不可用，当前展示本地权限目录：: Backend permission API is unavailable, showing the local permission catalog:
translation.后续按后台模块、接口和危险操作继续细化权限点。: Later stages will refine permission points by admin module, API, and dangerous operation.
translation.后续接入 Claude Code 等客户端时，只需新增客户端配置和对应步骤。: When adding clients such as Claude Code later, only add the client configuration and matching steps.
translation.启用 io.net 部署时必须填写 API Key: API Key is required when enabling io.net deployment
translation.启用SSRF防护（推荐开启以保护服务器安全）: Enable SSRF Protection (Recommended for server security)
translation.启用主资源保护后必须选择主资源渠道: Select primary resource channels after enabling primary resource protection
translation.启用后可接入 io.net GPU 资源: After enabling, you can access io.net GPU resources
translation.启用后可添加图片URL进行多模态对话: After enabling, you can add image URLs for multimodal conversations
translation.启用后套餐将在用户端展示。是否继续？: After enabling, the plan will be shown to users. Continue?
translation.启用后将优先复用上一次成功的渠道（粘滞选路）。: When enabled, the last successful channel will be reused preferentially (sticky routing).
translation.启用后将使用 Creem Test Mode: Use Creem Test Mode after enabling
translation.启用后该账号可重新参与智能调度: After enabling, this account can participate in smart dispatch again.
translation.启用后这些账号可重新参与智能调度: After enabling, these accounts can participate in smart dispatch again.
translation.启用性能监控后，当系统资源使用率超过设定阈值时，将拒绝新的 Relay 请求 (: When performance monitoring is enabled and system resource usage exceeds the set threshold, new Relay requests (/v1, /v1beta, etc.) will be rejected to protect system stability.
translation.启用此模式后，将使用您自定义的请求体发送API请求，模型配置面板的参数设置将被忽: After enabling this mode, your custom request body will be used to send API requests, and parameter settings in the model configuration panel will be ignored.
translation.启用用户模型请求速率限制（可能会影响高并发性能）: Enable user model request rate limit (may affect high concurrency performance)
translation.启用磁盘缓存后，大请求体将临时存储到磁盘而非内存，可显著降低内存占用，适用于处理: When enabled, large request bodies are temporarily stored on disk instead of memory, significantly reducing memory usage. Suitable for requests with large images/files. SSD recommended.
translation.命中判定：usage 中存在 cached tokens（例如 cached_t: Hit determination: Presence of cached tokens in usage (e.g. cached_tokens/prompt_cache_hit_tokens) is considered a hit.
translation.命中粘滞路由并满足保留阈值，优先复用该渠道: Sticky route matched and met the retention threshold, so this channel was reused first
translation.命中该亲和规则后，会把此模板合并到渠道参数覆盖中（同名键由模板覆盖）。: When this affinity rule is matched, the template is merged into the channel parameter overrides (same-name keys are overridden by the template).
translation.和Claude不同，默认情况下Gemini的思考模型会自动决定要不要思考，就算不: Unlike Claude, Gemini thinking models automatically decide whether to think by default. They work normally even without the adapter enabled. If you need billing, set the price of models without suffix to the thinking price. Use format like gemini-2.5-pro-preview-06-05-thinking-128 to specify exact thinking budget.
translation.四大能力，全面提升接入体验与服务稳定性: Four core capabilities improve access experience and service stability
translation.固定按次价格模型只使用按次成本: Fixed-price models only use the per-request cost
translation.图标使用 react-icons（Simple Icons）或 URL/emoj: Icon uses react-icons (Simple Icons) or URL/emoji, e.g.: github, gitlab, si:google
translation.图标使用@lobehub/icons库，如：OpenAI、Claude.Colo: The icon uses the @lobehub/icons library, such as: OpenAI, Claude.Color, supports chain parameters: OpenAI.Avatar.type={'platform'}, OpenRouter.Avatar.shape={'square'}, query all available icons please
translation.图片功能在自定义请求体模式下不可用: Image functionality is not available in custom request body mode
translation.图片输入：{{tokens}} / 1M * 模型倍率 {{modelRatio: Image input: {{tokens}} / 1M * model ratio {{modelRatio}} * image ratio {{imageRatio}} * {{ratioType}} {{ratio}} = {{amount}}
translation.图片输入倍率（仅部分模型支持该计费）: Image input ratio (only supported by some models for billing)
translation.图片输入相关的倍率设置，键为模型名称，值为倍率，仅部分模型支持该计费: Ratio settings related to image input, key is model name, value is ratio, only supported by some models for billing
translation.在 Claude Code 中发送简单任务，然后回到本站用量日志确认 /v1/m: Send a simple task in Claude Code, then return to usage logs to confirm the /v1/messages record.
translation.在 Codex 客户端发送简单请求，然后回到本站用量日志确认记录。: Send a simple request in the Codex client, then return to usage logs to confirm the record.
translation.在 SDK 中设置 apiKey 和 baseURL，baseURL 使用当前站: Set apiKey and baseURL in the SDK. The baseURL should be the current site domain plus /v1.
translation.在Gotify服务器创建应用后获得的令牌，用于发送通知: Token obtained after creating an application on the Gotify server, used to send notifications
translation.在Gotify服务器的应用管理中创建新应用: Create a new application in the Gotify server's application management
translation.在可用候选中综合评分最高: Highest composite score among available candidates
translation.在同一工作台内配置模型参数、发送测试请求并查看调试载荷，适合快速验证 API 行: Configure model parameters, send test requests, and inspect debug payloads in one workbench for fast API behavior checks.
translation.在客户端供应商或接口类型中选择 OpenAI、OpenAI Compatible: Choose OpenAI, OpenAI Compatible, or custom OpenAI in the client provider or API type.
translation.在模型广场向用户展示的端点: Endpoint shown to users in Model Marketplace
translation.在此输入 Logo 图片地址: Enter the Logo image URL here
translation.在此输入新的公告内容，支持 Markdown & HTML 代码: Enter the new announcement content here, supports Markdown & HTML code
translation.在此输入新的关于内容，支持 Markdown & HTML 代码。如果输入的是一: Enter new about content here, support Markdown
translation.在此输入新的页脚，留空则使用默认页脚，支持 HTML 代码: Enter the new footer here, leave blank to use the default footer, supports HTML code.
translation.在此输入用户协议内容，支持 Markdown & HTML 代码: Enter user agreement content here, supports Markdown & HTML code
translation.在此输入隐私政策内容，支持 Markdown & HTML 代码: Enter privacy policy content here, supports Markdown & HTML code
translation.在此输入首页内容，支持 Markdown & HTML 代码，设置后首页的状态信: Enter the home page content here, supports Markdown
translation.在编辑器插件中新增 OpenAI Compatible 或自定义 OpenAI: Add an OpenAI Compatible or custom OpenAI provider in the editor plugin.
translation.在聊天客户端中新增 OpenAI Compatible、OpenAI API 或: Add an OpenAI Compatible, OpenAI API, or custom provider in the chat client.
translation.在默认列表基础上新增一个分组: Add a new group to the default list
translation.场景：站点提供两个价格档位，用户可以按需选择: Scenario: site offers two pricing tiers, users can choose as needed
translation.场景：站点有 standard 和 premium 两个用户可选分组。希望 vi: Scenario: site has standard and premium as selectable groups. Want vip users to see exclusive but not standard
translation.场景：站点有 standard（倍率 1.0）和 premium（倍率 0.5）: Scenario: site has standard (ratio 1.0) and premium (ratio 0.5). Want vip users to get a discount on standard tokens too
translation.域名IP过滤详细说明: Recommended: When enabled, domains are resolved via DNS and the resulting IPs are checked against private address ranges, effectively preventing DNS rebinding attacks that bypass SSRF protection. Note: A domain may resolve to multiple IPv4/IPv6 addresses. If you have configured an IP filter list, ensure it covers these addresses, otherwise access may fail.
translation.基于当前窗口上游 token 成本和目标利润率计算。: Calculated from current-window upstream token cost and target margin.
translation.基于当前窗口总经营成本和目标利润率计算。: Calculated from current-window operating cost and target margin.
translation.基于当前窗口总经营成本和目标毛利率计算。: Calculated from current-window operating cost and target gross margin.
translation.基础价格从配置价格设置读取；这里只配置成本倍率和充值倍率。: Base prices are read from pricing settings. Configure only cost and recharge multipliers here.
translation.基础价格来自配置价格设置；成本倍率和充值倍率来自渠道设置。: Base prices come from pricing settings; cost multipliers and recharge multiplier come from channel settings.
translation.基础价格来自配置价格设置；成本倍率来自渠道设置，充值倍率由充值成本和到账额度自动: Base prices come from pricing settings; the cost ratio comes from channel settings, and the recharge ratio is calculated from recharge cost and received balance.
translation.基础价格来自配置价格设置；系统价格先乘成本系数，再乘费用计算倍率，充值倍率由充值: Base prices come from model pricing settings; system prices are multiplied by the cost coefficient, then by the fee multiplier, and the recharge multiplier is calculated from paid and received amounts.
translation.填充 Codex CLI / Claude CLI 模版: Fill Codex CLI / Claude CLI Template
translation.填写 * 表示渠道默认规则: Use * for the channel default rule
translation.填写 Base URL 和 API Key: Fill Base URL and API Key
translation.填写 Issuer URL 后自动生成：: Auto-generated after filling in Issuer URL:
translation.填写Gotify服务器的完整URL地址: Fill in the complete URL address of the Gotify server
translation.填写后会自动拼接预设端点: Preset endpoints will be auto-appended after filling
translation.填写带https的域名，逗号分隔: Fill in domains with https, separated by commas
translation.填写用户协议内容后，用户注册时将被要求勾选已阅读用户协议: After filling in the user agreement content, users will be required to check that they have read the user agreement during registration
translation.填写隐私政策内容后，用户注册时将被要求勾选已阅读隐私政策: After filling in the privacy policy content, users will be required to check that they have read the privacy policy during registration
translation.填写音频补全价格前，需要先填写音频输入价格。: Fill in the audio input price before setting the audio completion price.
translation.处理中优先，完成请求按最后完成时间排序，未完成请求按创建时间排序: Processing requests first; completed requests sort by last completion time, unfinished requests by creation time
translation.处理中置顶，已完成按最后完成时间倒序；成本、计费与评分为异步核算口径: Processing items are pinned; completed items are sorted by latest completion time. Cost, billing, and scoring are calculated asynchronously.
translation.复制失败，请手动选择文本复制: Copy failed, please manually select and copy the text
translation.复制应用的令牌（Token）并填写到上方的应用令牌字段: Copy the application token and fill it in the application token field above
translation.复制成本规则到其他模型: Copy cost rule to other models
translation.复制所选兑换码到剪贴板: Copy selected redemption codes to clipboard
translation.复制渠道的所有信息: Copy all information for a channel
translation.复制生成的密钥并粘贴到此处: Copy the generated key and paste it here
translation.复用现有倍率配置组件，统一维护模型价格、分组倍率和工具调用定价。: Reuses the existing ratio configuration component to maintain model prices, group ratios, and tool-call pricing in one place.
translation.复用现有调度配置组件，统一承载候选、熔断、兜底和动态策略。: Reuses the existing scheduler configuration component to manage candidates, circuit breaking, fallback, and dynamic policies in one place.
translation.多模型统一接入，只需将基址替换为：: Unified multi-model access, just replace the base URL with:
translation.多渠道无感切换，低价接入主流编程模型: Seamless multi-channel failover with low-cost access to mainstream coding models
translation.多渠道智能调度、熔断旁路、透明计费，让 Codex 使用更稳定。: Smart multi-channel routing, circuit-breaker bypass, and transparent billing make Codex usage more stable.
translation.多渠道池与健康调度共同保障: Protected by multi-channel pools and health-based scheduling
translation.多渠道自动切换，低价接入主流编程模型: Automatic multi-channel switching with low-cost access to mainstream coding models
translation.多种充值方式，安全便捷: Multiple recharge methods, safe and convenient
translation.多组倍率、缓存计费和明细日志可见，团队成本更容易控制。: Group ratios, cache billing, and detailed logs are visible, making team costs easier to control.
translation.多维熔断与限流策略，异常自动隔离与降级，保护上游服务与整体可用性。: Multi-dimensional circuit breaking and rate limits isolate and downgrade failures to protect upstreams and overall availability.
translation.大请求体可能影响首包: Large request body may affect first byte
translation.失效账号会从运行账号移除，可人工恢复: Invalid accounts are removed from running accounts and can be restored manually
translation.失败与限流可追踪: Failures and rate limits are traceable
translation.失败只进完成率，不进财务收入和成本: Failures affect completion only, not financial revenue or cost
translation.失败后仍可能打到同一条异常线路，成本和体验不可控: After a failure it may still hit the same bad route, making cost and UX unpredictable
translation.失败自动旁路，减少中断重跑: Failures are bypassed automatically to reduce reruns
translation.奖励会在好友消费完成后自动计入邀请余额: Rewards are added to invite balance after friend usage is completed
translation.奖励会根据站点配置自动计算: Rewards are calculated automatically from site settings
translation.好友通过你的邀请链接注册后会自动绑定邀请关系: Friends are bound automatically after registering through your invite link
translation.好友通过你的邀请链接注册并完成邮箱验证: Friends register through your invite link and verify email
translation.好友首次充值并产生有效消费后可获得奖励: Rewards are available after the friend tops up and generates valid usage
translation.如：大带宽批量分析图片推荐: e.g. Large bandwidth batch analysis of image recommendations
translation.如使用图片、工具等能力，请确认所选模型和渠道支持。: For image, tool, or similar capabilities, confirm that the selected model and channel support them.
translation.如使用长缓存、思考模型等能力，请确认所选模型和渠道支持。: For long cache, reasoning models, or similar capabilities, confirm that the selected model and channel support them.
translation.如存在账号池采购、代理或封号损耗，请先录入资源成本台账。: Record account-pool purchases, proxy cost, or banned-account loss in the resource ledger first.
translation.如果 SDK 报连接失败，请确认网络环境可以访问当前站点。: If the SDK reports a connection failure, confirm that your network can access this site.
translation.如果亲和到的渠道失败，重试到其他渠道成功后，将亲和更新到成功的渠道。: If the affinity channel fails, after a successful retry on another channel, the affinity will be updated to the successful channel.
translation.如果你对接的是上游One API或者New API等转发项目，请使用OpenAI: If you are connecting to upstream One API or New API forwarding projects, please use OpenAI type. Do not use this type unless you know what you are doing.
translation.如果你的客户端配置了完整 API 地址，请将域名部分替换为新域名。: If your client uses a full API URL, replace only the domain part with the new domain.
translation.如果客户端缓存了旧模型列表，请刷新供应商模型或重新导入。: If the client cached an old model list, refresh provider models or import again.
translation.如果工具只支持 OpenAI 格式，请改用 OpenAI 兼容接入方式。: If the tool only supports OpenAI format, use the OpenAI-compatible integration instead.
translation.如果插件区分补全模型和聊天模型，请分别填写本站支持的模型。: If the plugin separates completion and chat models, configure supported models for each field.
translation.如果用户请求中包含系统提示词，则使用此设置拼接到用户的系统提示词前面: If the user request contains a system prompt, this setting will be appended to the user's system prompt
translation.如果镜像为私有，请填写密码或Token: If the image is private, please fill in the password or token
translation.如果镜像为私有，请填写用户名: If the image is private, please fill in the username
translation.存在影响用户体验的异常，建议先处理高影响渠道和模型: User experience is affected. Handle high-impact channels and models first.
translation.存在惩罚，鼓励讨论新话题: Presence penalty, encourages discussing new topics
translation.存在高风险异常，请优先处理熔断、排队或大面积失败: High-risk anomalies exist. Prioritize circuit breakers, queues, or broad failures.
translation.完成率和倍率状态暂无明显异常，继续跟踪高峰期兜底占比。: Completion and ratio status look normal. Continue tracking peak fallback share.
translation.完成率略低，建议关注高峰期错误类型和兜底渠道占比。: Completion is slightly low. Watch peak error types and fallback-channel share.
translation.完成硬件类型、部署位置、副本数量等配置后，将自动计算价格: Price will be automatically calculated after completing hardware type, deployment location, number of replicas and other configurations
translation.完成设置并启用两步验证: Complete setup and enable two-factor authentication
translation.完成请求占比越高，这项越高: Higher completion ratio raises this score
translation.完整响应耗时越短，这项越高: Shorter full response duration raises this score
translation.定时刷新账号余额并记录余额事件: Refresh account balances on a schedule and record balance events
translation.定时检查上游倍率变化: Check upstream ratio changes on a schedule
translation.定期更改密码可以提高账户安全性: Regularly changing your password can improve account security
translation.实时评估、智能路由、自动切换，保障请求稳定、快速、可靠: Real-time scoring, smart routing, and automatic failover keep requests stable, fast, and reliable
translation.实时负载越低，这项越高: Lower realtime load raises this score
translation.实际写回客户端的响应字节: Actual response bytes written to clients
translation.实际收费按命中档位结算: Actual charges settle by matched tier
translation.客户最关心的是能不能持续可用。首页直接展示成功率、延迟和自动切换趋势，让服务质量: Customers care most about continuous availability. The homepage shows success rate, latency, and failover trends so service quality is clear at a glance.
translation.客户只需要维护一个 Base URL，后面由网关根据分组、健康、冷却和成本策略做: Customers maintain one Base URL while the gateway chooses in real time by group, health, cooldown, and cost policies.
translation.客户端可能没有请求到本站，请检查 Base URL 是否仍指向官方地址。: The client may not be sending requests to this site. Check whether Base URL still points to the official address.
translation.客户端在未收到有效下游响应前断开，疑似由渠道流式响应异常诱发: The client disconnected before receiving an effective downstream response; the channel stream may have triggered it.
translation.客户端如果有单独的路径配置，不要重复填写 /chat/completions。: If the client has a separate path field, do not duplicate /chat/completions.
translation.客户端支持模型同步时可从本站拉取模型；不支持时手动填写模型名。: If the client supports model sync, pull models from this site. Otherwise, enter model names manually.
translation.客户端请求体和请求头估算: Estimated client request body and headers
translation.客户端请求格式与当前接入类型不一致，请切换工具的 API 类型。: The client request format does not match this integration type. Switch the tool API type.
translation.客服联系方式管理，可以配置多个公开联系方式用于全站展示（最多20个）: Manage support contacts for site-wide public display (up to 20).
translation.容器启动后执行的命令: Command to execute after container starts
translation.容器对外服务的端口号，可选: Port number for external service, optional
translation.密码已保存，列表不会展示明文: Password is saved and never shown in plain text
translation.密码已复制到剪贴板：: Password has been copied to clipboard:
translation.密码已重置并已复制到剪贴板：: Password has been reset and copied to clipboard:
translation.密码长度至少为8个字符: Password must be at least 8 characters long
translation.密钥（编辑模式下，保存的密钥不会显示）: Key (in edit mode, saved keys will not be displayed)
translation.密钥可留空，创建后渠道会保持自动禁用；请到账号管理导入 Codex OAuth: The key can be left empty. After creation, the channel stays auto-disabled; import Codex OAuth JSON credentials from Account Management before enabling it. When filled, only JSON objects containing access_token and account_id are supported
translation.密钥将以Bearer方式添加到请求头中，用于验证webhook请求的合法性: The key will be added to the request header as Bearer to verify the legitimacy of the webhook request
translation.密钥必须是 JSON 对象: Key must be a JSON object
translation.密钥必须是合法的 JSON 格式！: Key must be in valid JSON format!
translation.密钥格式无效，请输入有效的 JSON 格式密钥: Invalid key format, please enter a valid JSON format key
translation.对于官方渠道，new-api已经内置地址，除非是第三方代理站点或者Azure的特: For official channels, the new-api has a built-in address. Unless it is a third-party proxy site or a special Azure access address, there is no need to fill it in
translation.对照支付渠道、交易号和创建时间。: Compare payment channel, trade number, and creation time.
translation.对照用户消耗与渠道费用: Compare user consumption with channel costs
translation.导入后会追加到当前渠道账号池，不会在列表中展示完整凭证: Imported credentials are appended to this channel account pool and will not be fully shown in the list.
translation.导入的配置将覆盖当前设置，是否继续？: The imported configuration will overwrite the current settings, continue?
translation.将 reasoning_content 转换为 <think> 标签拼接到内容中: Convert reasoning_content to <think> tags and append to content
translation.将仅保留第一个密钥文件，其余文件将被移除，是否继续？: Only the first key file will be retained, and the remaining files will be removed. Continue?
translation.将切换到下一候选: Will switch to the next candidate
translation.将删除 {{value}} 天前的日志文件。: Log files older than {{value}} days will be deleted.
translation.将删除已使用、已禁用及过期的兑换码，此操作不可撤销。: This will delete all used, disabled, and expired redemption codes, this operation cannot be undone.
translation.将删除所有仍在内存中的渠道亲和性缓存条目。: This will delete all channel affinity cache entries still in memory.
translation.将只保留最近 {{value}} 个日志文件，其余将被删除。: Only the last {{value}} log files will be retained; the rest will be deleted.
translation.将大请求体临时存储到磁盘: Store large request bodies temporarily on disk
translation.将当前渠道中授权异常的运行账号提交到自动授权队列: Submit authorization-error running accounts in the current channel to the automatic authorization queue
translation.将所有渠道中授权异常的运行账号提交到自动授权队列: Submit authorization-error running accounts in all channels to the automatic authorization queue
translation.将把当前编辑中的模型 {{name}} 的价格配置，批量应用到已勾选的 {{co: The pricing configuration of the currently edited model {{name}} will be applied to the {{count}} selected models.
translation.将清理该分组与渠道对应的共享粘滞路由缓存: This will clear shared sticky route cache for the selected group and channel.
translation.将清除余额不足、冷却和熔断等运行态标记；未真正恢复的渠道可能会在后续调度中再次进: This clears runtime markers such as insufficient balance, cooldown, and circuit breaker. Channels that have not truly recovered may become abnormal again during later scheduling.
translation.将清除所有保存的配置并恢复默认设置，此操作不可撤销。是否继续？: This will clear all saved configurations and restore default settings, this operation cannot be undone. Continue?
translation.将清除此 session 对该渠道的空输出临时避让。: Clear this session's temporary empty-output avoidance for this channel.
translation.将清除选定时间之前的所有日志: This will clear all logs before the selected time
translation.将覆盖当前智能调度配置，并保留其它系统设置不变。: This will overwrite the current smart scheduling config while keeping other system settings unchanged.
translation.将追加 2 条规则到现有规则列表。: 2 rules will be appended to the existing rule list.
translation.将额外乘以上述价格: will additionally multiply the above prices
translation.少写配置，多看结果。把长会话、限流转移、团队成本和 IDE 自动化放到一条稳定接: Write less configuration and focus on results. Long sessions, rate-limit transfer, team costs, and IDE automation live on one stable access path.
translation.尚未应用到动态倍率: Not applied to dynamic ratio yet
translation.就近选择低延迟渠道，流式输出保持顺滑，减少等待和重试时间。: Select nearby low-latency channels, keep streaming smooth, and reduce waiting and retry time.
translation.展示最新用户，用于快速确认分层是否符合预期。: Shows the latest users to quickly confirm whether segmentation matches expectations.
translation.展示最近 30 天的充值与订阅支付记录: Shows top-up and subscription payments from the last 30 days
translation.展示真实受邀用户、消费和充值状态: Shows real invited users, usage, and top-up status
translation.展示被邀请用户、消费和奖励状态: Show invited users, spend, and reward status
translation.展示队列中、执行中、成功、失败等任务状态。: 展示队列中、执行中、成功、失败等任务状态。
translation.嵌套映射：用户分组 → 使用分组 → 倍率: Nested mapping: user group → using group → ratio
translation.已从 Discovery 获取配置，可继续手动修改所有字段。: Configuration retrieved from Discovery. You can continue to manually modify all fields.
translation.已切换至最优倍率视图，每个模型使用其最低倍率分组: Switched to the optimal ratio view, each model uses its lowest ratio group
translation.已切换至最优分组价格视图，每个模型使用其最低价格分组: Switched to the best group pricing view. Each model now uses its cheapest available group.
translation.已将模型 {{name}} 的价格配置批量应用到 {{count}} 个模型: Applied the pricing configuration of model {{name}} to {{count}} models in batch
translation.已开启全局请求透传：参数覆写、模型重定向、渠道适配等 NewAPI 内置功能将失: Global request pass-through is enabled. Built-in NewAPI features such as parameter overrides, model redirection, and channel adaptation will be disabled. This is not a best practice. If this causes issues, please do not submit an issue.
translation.已成功开始测试所有已启用通道，请刷新页面查看结果。: Successfully started testing all enabled channels. Please refresh page to view results.
translation.已更新完毕所有已启用通道余额！: Updated quota for all enabled channels!
translation.已有利润但低于目标毛利，建议生成倍率快照后小流量灰度。: Profit is positive but below target margin. Generate a ratio snapshot and canary with small traffic.
translation.已解锁豆包自定义 API 地址编辑: Custom Doubao API address editing unlocked
translation.常见问答管理，为用户提供常见问题的答案（最多50个，前端显示最新20条）: FAQ management, providing answers to common questions for users (maximum 50, display latest 20 on the front end)
translation.废弃后仍保留归档信息，但不再作为可恢复账号处理: Discarded accounts keep archive data but are no longer recoverable
translation.废弃账号会从运行账号移除并作为不再调度的归档: Discarded accounts are removed from running accounts and archived as no longer scheduled
translation.延长容器时长将会产生额外费用，请确认您有足够的账户余额。: Extending container duration will incur additional charges, please ensure you have sufficient account balance.
translation.延长操作一旦确认无法撤销，费用将立即扣除。: Once confirmed, the extension operation cannot be undone, and charges will be deducted immediately.
translation.延长时长不能超过720小时（30天）: Extension duration cannot exceed 720 hours (30 days)
translation.延长时长至少为1小时: Extension duration must be at least 1 hour
translation.建议在生产环境中使用 MySQL 或 PostgreSQL 数据库，或确保 SQ: It is recommended to use MySQL or PostgreSQL databases in production environments, or ensure that the SQLite database file is mapped to the persistent storage of the host machine.
translation.建议小于CDN空闲超时时间，默认55秒: Recommended below the CDN idle timeout; default is 55 seconds
translation.建议已生成，后台动态倍率会按配置自动应用并保留记录。: Recommendation generated. Background dynamic ratios auto-apply according to configuration and keep an audit record.
translation.建议已生成，请结合成本明细人工确认。: Recommendation generated. Confirm manually with the cost breakdown.
translation.建议已进入观察期，确认前请关注收入缺口和请求量变化。: The recommendation is in observation. Watch revenue gap and request volume before confirming.
translation.建议真实请求前保持成功续期开启、失败清理开启；如果上游偶发失败很多，可临时选择失: Before sending real traffic, keep success renewal and failure cleanup enabled. If upstream failures are mostly intermittent, temporarily keep sticky records and rely on circuit-breaker downgrading.
translation.开关会保持旧配置字段兼容，当前不会改动后端结构。: These switches stay compatible with the existing configuration fields and do not change the backend structure.
translation.开启「默认使用 auto 分组」后，新建令牌和初始令牌都会自动设为 auto。: After enabling "Default to auto group", new tokens and initial tokens will be set to auto.
translation.开启之后会清除用户提示词中的: After enabling, the user prompt will be cleared
translation.开启之后将上游地址替换为服务器地址: After enabling, the upstream address will be replaced with the server address
translation.开启后，using_group 会参与 cache key（不同分组隔离）。: When enabled, using_group will be part of the cache key (isolated by group).
translation.开启后，仅\"消费\"和\"错误\"日志将记录您的客户端IP地址: After enabling, only "consumption" and "error" logs will record your client IP address
translation.开启后，对免费模型（倍率为0，或者价格为0）的模型也会预消耗额度: After enabling, free models (ratio 0 or price 0) will also pre-consume quota
translation.开启后，将定期发送ping数据保持连接活跃: After enabling, ping data will be sent periodically to keep the connection active
translation.开启后，当前分组渠道失败时会按顺序尝试下一个分组的渠道: After enabling, when the current group channel fails, it will try the next group's channel in order
translation.开启后，所有请求将直接透传给上游，不会进行任何处理（重定向和渠道适配也将失效）,: When enabled, all requests will be directly forwarded to the upstream without any processing (redirects and channel adaptation will also be disabled). Please enable with caution.
translation.开启后，模型名称会参与 cache key（不同模型隔离）。: When enabled, the model name is included in the cache key (isolates different models).
translation.开启后，若该规则命中且请求失败，将不会切换渠道重试。: When enabled, if this rule matches and the request fails, no channel switch retry will occur.
translation.开启后，规则名称会参与 cache key（不同规则隔离）。: When enabled, the rule name will be part of the cache key (isolated by rule).
translation.开启后，该渠道请求 Claude 时将强制追加 ?beta=true（无需客户端: When enabled, requests to Claude through this channel will force append ?beta=true (no need for clients to pass this parameter manually)
translation.开启后，违规请求将额外扣费。: When enabled, violation requests will incur additional charges.
translation.开启后，长时间无数据的流式或JSON响应会定期向客户端投递空包: When enabled, streaming or JSON responses with long idle gaps periodically send empty chunks to the client
translation.开启后不限制：必须设置模型倍率: After enabling, no limit: must set model ratio
translation.开启后创建令牌默认选择auto分组，初始令牌也将设为auto: When enabled, new tokens default to auto group, initial tokens are also set to auto
translation.开启后显示系统健康探活请求: Show system health probe requests when enabled
translation.开启后未登录用户无法访问模型广场: When enabled, unauthenticated users cannot access the model marketplace
translation.开启后该 OpenAI 渠道会参与 Codex Responses 路由，并单独: When enabled, this OpenAI channel participates in Codex Responses routing and separately checks the Codex image_generation tool. The normal image API does not depend on this switch.
Starting batch test of ${count} models, cleared previous results...

translation.警告：启用保活后，如果已经写入保活数据后渠道出错，系统无法重试，如果必须开启，推: Warning: After enabling keep-alive, if the channel fails after keep-alive data has been written, the system cannot retry. If you must enable it, it is recommended to set the Ping interval as large as possible
translation.警告：禁用两步验证将永久删除您的验证设置和所有备用码，此操作不可撤销！: Warning: Disabling two-factor authentication will permanently delete your verification settings and all backup codes. This action is irreversible!
translation.负责系统治理、全局配置、审计日志和高风险操作兜底。: Own system governance, global configuration, audit logs, and high-risk operation fallback.
translation.账号余额、密钥额度和上游账户可用性。: Account balances, key quotas, and upstream account availability.
translation.账号余额低于该值时记录告警并通知管理员: Record an alert and notify admins when an account balance falls below this value
translation.账号余额告警和倍率同步: Account balance alerts and ratio sync
translation.账号已恢复，默认保持禁用: Account restored and kept disabled by default
translation.账号归因缺失，统计可能无法挂到账号: Account attribution is missing, so stats may not attach to the account
translation.账号池为空或全部账号已禁用: Account pool is empty or all accounts are disabled
translation.账号池采购、封号损耗、代理和服务器等资源成本独立记录。: Account-pool purchases, banned-account losses, proxies, servers, and other resource costs are recorded independently.
translation.账号额度、地区网络和速率限制都可能让长任务中断: Account quota, regional networking, and rate limits can interrupt long tasks
translation.账户绑定、安全设置和身份验证: Account binding, security settings and identity verification
translation.购买套餐后即可享受模型权益: Enjoy model benefits after purchasing a plan

translation.购买订阅获得模型额度/次数: Purchase a subscription to get model quota/usage
translation.超级管理员未设置充值链接！: Super administrator has not set the recharge link!
translation.超过该天数的余额和倍率事件会自动清理: Balance and ratio events older than this will be cleaned automatically

translation.轮询模式必须搭配Redis和内存缓存功能使用，否则性能将大幅降低，并且无法实现轮: Polling mode must be used with Redis and memory cache functions, otherwise the performance will be significantly reduced and the polling function will not be implemented
translation.辅助排查长时间排队、上游失败和结果回写异常。: 辅助排查长时间排队、上游失败和结果回写异常。

translation.输出吞吐越高，这项越高: Higher output throughput raises this score
translation.过期时间不能早于当前时间！: Expiration time cannot be earlier than the current time!

translation.近期已有真实请求则跳过体检: Skip probe when recent real requests exist
translation.近期成功率越高，这项越高: Higher recent success rate raises this item

translation.这些价格都是可选项，不填也可以。: All of these prices are optional and can be left empty.
translation.这将删除超过 10 分钟未使用的临时缓存文件: This will delete temporary cache files that have not been used for more than 10 minutes

translation.进行该操作时，可能导致渠道访问错误，请仅在数据库出现问题时使用: When performing this operation, it may cause channel access errors. Please only use it when there is a problem with the database.

translation.适用于展示系统功能的场景，提供基础功能演示: Suitable for scenarios where the system functions are displayed, providing basic feature demonstrations.
translation.选择 {{channel}}：原粘滞渠道未满足保留条件，已切到当前更优候选。: Select {{channel}}: the previous sticky channel no longer met retention rules, so it switched to a better current candidate.

translation.选择 {{channel}}：系统从当前可用候选中完成调度。: Select {{channel}}: the system dispatched from the currently available candidates.

translation.速度综合表现越好，这项越高: Better overall speed raises this score
translation.遇到 429、5xx、超时或流式异常时，自动记录保护事件并切换备用渠道，用户侧仍: When 429, 5xx, timeout, or streaming errors occur, protection events are recorded and traffic moves to standby channels while users keep the same endpoint.
translation.遇到限流、熔断或不可用线路时，自动尝试备用渠道。: When rate limits, circuit breakers, or unavailable routes occur, standby channels are tried automatically.

translation.采购批次、供应商、账号损耗原因等: Purchase batch, vendor, account loss reason, etc.
translation.重复的键名，此值将被后面的同名键覆盖: Duplicate key name, this value will be overridden by the subsequent key with the same name
translation.重新生成备用码将使现有的备用码失效，请确保您已保存了当前的备用码。: Regenerating backup codes will invalidate existing backup codes. Please ensure you have saved the current backup codes.
translation.重置邮件发送成功，请检查邮箱！: The reset email was sent successfully, please check your email!
translation.链接中的{key}将自动替换为sk-xxxx，{address}将自动替换为系统: The {key} in the link will be automatically replaced with sk-xxxx, the {address} will be automatically replaced with the server address in system settings, and the end will not have / and /v1
translation.键为分组名称，值为另一个 JSON 对象，键为分组名称，值为该分组的用户的特殊分: The key is the group name, and the value is another JSON object. The key is the group name, and the value is the special group ratio for users in that group. For example: {"vip": {"default": 0.5, "test": 1}} means that users in the vip group have a ratio of 0.5 when using tokens from the default group, and a ratio of 1 when using tokens from the test group
translation.键为原状态码，值为要复写的状态码，仅影响本地判断: The key is the original status code, and the value is the status code to override, only affects local judgment
translation.键为用户分组名称，值为操作映射对象。内层键以\"+:\"开头表示添加指定分组（键: Keys are user group names and values are operation mappings. Inner keys prefixed with "+:" add the specified group (key is the group name, value is the description); keys prefixed with "-:" remove the specified group; keys without a prefix add that group directly. Example: {"vip": {"+:premium": "Advanced group", "special": "Special group", "-:default": "Default group"}} means vip users can access the premium and special groups while removing access to the default group.
translation.键为端点类型，值为路径和方法对象: The key is the endpoint type, the value is the path and method object
translation.键为请求中的模型名称，值为要替换的模型名称: Key is the model name in the request, value is the model name to replace
translation.键的前缀 +: 表示添加，-: 表示移除，无前缀表示追加。值为分组描述（移除时填: Key prefix +: means add, -: means remove, no prefix means append. Value is the group description (use "remove" for removal).

translation.队列越深、等待越久，这项越低: Deeper queues and longer waits lower this score

translation.集中维护运营、支付、模型、倍率、限流和性能等全局配置，所有保存动作都会影响线上控: Centrally manages global settings for operations, payments, models, ratios, rate limits, and performance; every save affects the live console behavior.
translation.集中配置智能模型网关的调度策略、候选筛选、资源保护、动态倍率和兜底规则。: 集中配置智能模型网关的调度策略、候选筛选、资源保护、动态倍率和兜底规则。

translation.高危状态码重试风险告知与免责声明Markdown:
### ⚠️ High-Risk Operation: Risk Notice and Disclaimer for 504/524 Retry
By default, this project does not retry for status codes `400` (bad request), `504` (gateway timeout), and `524` (timeout occurred).
 In many cases, 504 and 524 mean the request has reached the upstream AI service and processing has started, but the connection was closed due to long processing time.

Enabling redirection/retry for these timeout status codes is a **high-risk operation**. Before enabling it, you must read and understand the consequences below:

#### 1. Core Risks (Read Carefully)
1. 💸 Duplicate/multiple billing risk: Most upstream AI providers **still charge** for requests that started processing but got interrupted by network timeout (504/524). If retry is triggered, a new upstream request will be sent, which can lead to **duplicate or multiple charges**.
2. ⏳ Severe client timeout: If a single request already timed out, adding retries can multiply total latency and cause severe or unacceptable timeout behavior for your final client/caller.
3. 💥 Request backlog and system crash risk: Forcing retries on timeout requests keeps threads and connections occupied for longer. Under high concurrency, this can cause serious backlog, exhaust system resources, trigger a cascading failure, and crash your proxy service.

#### 2. Risk Acknowledgement
If you still choose to enable this feature, you acknowledge all of the following:
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认输入文本: I understand the duplicate billing and crash risks, and confirm enabling it.
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项1: I have fully read and understood the risks and fully understand the destructive consequences of forcing retries for status codes 504 and 524.
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项2: I have communicated with the upstream provider and confirmed that the timeout issue is an upstream bottleneck and cannot be resolved upstream at this time.
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项3: I voluntarily accept all duplicate/multiple billing risks and will not file issues or complaints in this project repository regarding billing anomalies caused by this retry behavior.
translation.高危状态码重试风险确认项4: I voluntarily accept system stability risks, including severe client timeout and possible service crash. Any consequences caused by enabling this feature are my own responsibility.
